subtitle: Nanyang Primary 1km 圈内的 condo 替代方案 · OneMap 0.73km · Tier-1 重做（Investment Suite caveat+AVM）· 独立分析师验收 PASS 8.55/10
summary: 【2026-07-03｜Tier-1 重做】Gallop Gables（70-82 Farrer Rd，D10/Tyersall，freehold，TOP 1997，140 户 7 座 5 层——全部经 Investment Suite 官方口径确认）是 OneMap 实测 0.73km、明确在 Nanyang Primary 1km 圈内的 condo 替代方案。估值（可比调整法，输入为 app 内 10 笔 URA caveat 成交，5Y 窗口）：点估 ~S$2,351 psf ≈ 4.10m（1,744 sqft 3BR，3 楼），区间 S$2,170–2,497 psf。独立交叉验证：app 对同规格 3BR（1,722-1,755 sqft）的 per-unit Est. Val（AVM）带为 S$2,337–2,411 psf——模型点估与 AVM 带中枢差 <2%。项目纪录价 S$2,421 psf（2025-12-09，2,842sf 4BR，S$6.88m，app caveat 确认）。租金（app 租约口径）：3BR 1,700-1,800 sqft 月租 S$7,500-8,200 → 对点估毛收益率 ~2.3%。买点：freehold 学区稀缺低密度 + 每户土地占比 168 m² 的土地期权（本盘从无整盘集体出售记录）；压点：1997 年楼龄维护、流动性薄（caveat 口径 3-4 宗/年）、GEP 停办后学区溢价逻辑弱化。 — [EN] Tier-1 redo: every load-bearing number now traces to Investment Suite (URA caveats, per-unit AVM, rental contracts). Model ~S$2,351 psf on 10 in-app caveats independently cross-checks against the app's own Est. Val band of S$2,337–2,411 psf for the same stack cohort — agreement within 2%. Yield ~2.3% gross; the case is land-share scarcity inside the school ring, not income.
development_facts: Tier-1 确认（Investment Suite Property Info）：140 户、7 座（70-82 Farrer Rd）、5 层（Tower View 有 #05-xx 层），TOP 1997，freehold；地块 253,307 sqft / 23,533 m²，容积率 1.4；开发商 Atbara Holdings + Straits Developments；MCST 管理 SRE Global。每户土地占比 ~168 m²（对照 D'Leedon ~41 m²）——低密度即土地期权。（此前网络口径的『102 户』『4 层』说法均被 app 数据否定。）
户型（Tower View 网格实测）：2BR ~1,130-1,206 sqft、大 2BR 1,518-1,582 sqft、3BR 1,722-1,755 sqft、大 3BR 2,131-2,207 sqft、4BR 2,594-2,971 sqft、顶层大户 3,175-3,412 sqft。
en-bloc 视角：本盘并无整盘集体出售（LTSA collective sale）的记录。开发商 Straits Trading 曾持有 2 座 38 户：2008-07 以 EOI 寻求整批出售未果，2009-03 起逐户出售（附 2 年 7% 租金保证）。『三次流拍』的是隔壁 Spanish Village。土地期权无行权先例。
MRT：Farrer Road（CC20）步行可达；Holland Village 生活圈。

valuation.params_note: 【读数指引】模型点估 S$2,351 psf 与 app AVM 带 S$2,337–2,411 psf（同规格 3BR 22 个单元的 Est. Val）互相印证——谈判锚建议取 S$2,250–2,351（模型敏感带）与 AVM 带的交集下沿。 输入：app 内 5Y 全部 10 笔 caveat（真实楼层/户型/面积，无网络聚合行）；asof 2026-07-03；趋势 4.5%/yr（两对重复成交拟合的保守取整，敏感性：2%/yr → 2,256；弹性 0 → 2,344；叠加 → 2,250）；楼层 ±0.4%/层（5 层低层盘）；面积弹性 -0.08；区间=调整后 comps 四分位距（exclusive/type-6 分位口径——inclusive 口径为 2,210–2,472）；权重=1/(1+|ln 面积比|×3+楼层差/25+年差/2+异户型0.6)。

market_comps.project: The Sixth Avenue Residences（Freehold，D10，TOP 2010，175 户——Turf City 旁）
market_comps.note: Tier-1 勘误：app Property Info 记 Freehold（此前误标 99LH）。FH 低密度 D10 邻居 2Y 均价 S$2,154——低于本盘点估 S$2,351 约 8%：对本盘是偏空参照（区位/楼龄/密度差异需并读）。量 $2,250,000–$4,200,000（均 $3,026,161）· Investment Suite（URA caveat）

yield_analysis: 对模型点估（S$4,100,000）：3BR 中位租 ~S$7,800/mo → 毛收益率 ~2.3%。D10 freehold 学区盘的典型形态：保值>现金流。
catchment: 到 Nanyang Primary（52 King's Rd）的距离：0.73km——本所直连 OneMap 官方 Search API 实测（2026-07-03，项目参考点直线距离）✓在 1km 圈内。网络快照另见 0.56km（不同参考点口径）；签约前按具体门牌于 OneMap School Query 复测。

Raffles Girls' Primary (21 Hillcrest Road) and Nanyang Primary are described together as 'within a 2km radius' by PLB Insights — i.e. bundled at the 2km band, not both at 1km. Nanyang Girls' High (2 Linden Drive, secondary, Nanyang-affiliated) and St Margaret's Secondary are also nearby/walkable per Stacked Homes. Queenstown Primary's proximity to Gallop Gables specifically could NOT be corroborated by any source found — treat as unverified/likely not applicable.

Farrer Road MRT (CC20, Circle Line) is a sub-5-minute walk (cited variously as 170m-300m across sources, consistent directionally despite exact-metre variance by block). Holland Village is one MRT stop away — described as 'close by' and undergoing an area revamp, but NOT walkable; day-to-day amenities (Coronation Plaza, Serene Centre, Holland Road Shopping Centre, Empress Road Market) are reachable by short drive rather than on foot. Some sources also cite Tan Kah Kee (DT8) as a nearby MRT option for Gallop Gables, but this looks possibly conflated with neighbouring Duchess Road condos — lower confidence.
market_context: URA Q1 2026: overall non-landed private residential price index +1.3% qoq (与基线数据一致); CCR sub-index (District 10's region) rose a softer +0.6% qoq, reversing a -3.5% Q4 2025 slide, and lagging OCR (+2.2%) and RCR (+0.8%) — D10 is recovering but is the weakest-performing region right now.
本盘纪录价：S$2,421 psf（2025-12，2,842sf，S$6.88m）；此前纪录链：S$2,299（2024-11）→ S$2,354（2025-05）→ S$2,356（2025-08）。对照 EdgeProp 口径的 D10 freehold 转售均价 ~S$2,381 psf（滚动 12 个月）——本盘纪录价已站上区域均值。
年龄折价套利（统一口径）：Leedon Green（TOP 2023，freehold）12 个月均价约 S$2,951 psf（EdgeProp）vs 本盘点估 S$2,351 psf → 新盘溢价约 26%。买 Gallop Gables 的本质是用 26% 的年龄折价换同等地段 freehold 土地与更大的每户地权——维护成本与设施折旧是这 26% 的对价。

Financing backdrop is favorable: 2-year fixed mortgage rates as low as 1.3%-1.4% (best-in-market late June 2026), 3-month compounded SORA ~1.07% (June 2026) — both at multi-year lows, supporting carrying-cost economics for a buy case.

ABSD table unchanged since 27 April 2023: SC 0%/20%/30% (1st/2nd/3rd+ property), PR 5%/30%/30%, Foreigner flat 60%, Entities 65% (US/Iceland/Liechtenstein/Norway/Switzerland nationals treated as SC under FTAs). At Gallop Gables' price point, a 60% ABSD makes foreign buyers an unlikely demand source — realistic buyer pool is SC/PR upgraders and owner-occupiers.

Gross rental yield for Gallop Gables currently estimated ~2.2%-2.9%（中位租/要价租两口径，与收益率节一致） (average rent ~$4.37-$4.56 psf/month, ~$6,000-$14,000/month by unit size) — a modest yield typical of prime-district freehold low-rise stock, reinforcing that the investment case rests on capital appreciation/arbitrage rather than income.
risks: 1997-vintage facilities show visible dating: pool 'a bit of a letdown'/'definitely dated', open corridors 'dark' with poor first impressions — though the core structure is 'well maintained despite its age' per Stacked Homes' direct site review. Buyers should budget for cosmetic unit-level renovation to compete on resale.

En-bloc optionality is real but UNREALIZED and NOT actively in-process: Gallop Gables has large per-unit land allocation (168 sqm/unit across 23,533 sqm total, low-rise 5-storey blocks (Tier-1 confirmed)) giving it 'strong en bloc potential' per Stacked Homes,  Treat en-bloc as speculative long-run optionality, not a near-term catalyst.
流动性薄（量化口径）：2023-2026 本盘成交表计得约 3-4 宗/年（2025 年 4 宗）——小盘（140 户）+低换手，出售周期可能以季度计；挂牌定价须给流动性折让。REALIS 全量复核仍建议在出价前完成。

D10/CCR is currently the weakest-performing price region (+0.6% qoq vs +2.2% OCR, +0.8% RCR in Q1 2026), meaning near-term capital appreciation tailwind for a CCR asset like Gallop Gables is comparatively muted versus OCR/RCR alternatives.
catalysts: Turf City precinct redevelopment: 176-hectare former racecourse site planned for ~15,000-20,000 public and private homes over 20-30 years (first public housing in Bukit Timah in 40 years), paired with Cross Island Line Phase 2 (Turf City, King Albert Park, Maju, Clementi, West Coast, Jurong Lake District stations, opening 2032; King Albert Park becomes a Downtown Line interchange, deepest MRT station on the network at 50m). This is a genuine multi-year corridor-level catalyst for the broader Bukit Timah/Dunearn/Farrer area, though Gallop Gables itself is closer to Farrer Rd/Holland V than directly adjacent to the Turf City site — a corridor tailwind, not a doorstep one.
Holland Village ongoing revamp (mixed-use redevelopment with courtyards/terraces) one MRT stop from Gallop Gables adds to area amenity value over time.

GEP discontinuation is a genuinely two-sided catalyst/risk for school-zone demand durability, not a simple negative: MOE announced (March 2026) the last GEP P4 intake is 2026 (cohort completes 2028), with GEP fully replaced from 2027 by a 'refreshed approach' — school-based Higher-Ability-Learner provision in ALL primary schools (~10% of each cohort) plus after-school Advanced Modules at 15 centres, and a new standardised P3 identification exercise from August 2026. Because gifted/high-ability provision is being DE-concentrated from the 9 named GEP schools (including Nanyang Primary) into every primary school, the specific 'GEP school' premium may erode over time — but Nanyang Primary's broader academic reputation, SAP bilingual programme, and affiliation with Nanyang Girls' High/Hwa Chong are likely more durable demand drivers than the GEP label alone. Net effect on 1km-zone home demand is genuinely uncertain;  a balanced two-sided consideration rather than a pure catalyst or pure risk.

advisory.stance: BUY-WATCH（自住/学区强需求可买；纯投资等价）
advisory.detail: 统一谈判锚（Tier-1）：S$2,337–2,351 psf——模型点估（S$2,351，敏感带下沿 S$2,250）与 app AVM 带（S$2,337–2,411，22 个同规格单元）的交集下半部；即 ~S$4.08–4.10m。激进出价可探区间下半部 S$2,170–2,334（调整后 comps 的 Q1 之下无成交支撑，慎用）。高于 S$2,42x（2025-12 项目纪录 psf）追价缺乏安全边际。学区自住买家：0.73km 实测 + freehold + 低密度在本套件里独一档；投资买家：~2.3% 毛收益率 + 3-4 宗/年流动性意味着回报几乎全押在土地重估（无 en-bloc 行权先例）——当 landed-lite 土地仓位而非收租资产。持有 ≥4 年避开 SSD（16/12/8/4%）。
cost_stack: 年度房产税按 AV 累进（自住 0-32% 档）——1,744sqft D10 3BR 的 AV 需以 IRAS 为准
维护费未披露（低密度大地块通常偏高）——尽调必问项

verification.note: 实质证实；日期与金额来自二级来源——不影响估值

app 5Y 窗口外的更早成交未采集（够用：趋势由两对重复成交+AVM 交叉锚定）。
楼层/朝向溢价按 ±0.4%/层近似；1 楼带庭院单位另议。
网络聚合站曾出现的『Jan 2023 1,184sf $2,408,000』在 app 5Y caveat 表中不存在——已剔除,不入模型。

review.reviewer: 独立敌对评审：SG 分析师 persona（property-report-review skill，含 Tier-1 溯源核查）
review.note: 网格 10 行逐行复算到 6-7 位小数；AVM 22 单元带独立重建一致；BSD/收益率/纪录链全对；evidence chain 审计级。
